title: Better Baby Mode
description: This is a loose recreation of Fundy's baby mode with some twists.
body:
# 👶Better baby mode Better baby mode is a recreation of Fundy's baby mode ## 💾Installation Download the mod on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-baby-mode) and put it in your mods folder.
This mod requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## 🏢Features
💀Death Prevention - God gives you a boat when in water and saves you from falling into the void in the end - No fall damage (via feather falling, but you can still sprint jump like normal) - When suffocating, a block will be broken at the player's head - getting near lava turns it into obsidian, powder snow turns into water, and magma blocks turn into netherrack - Monsters die when they get within 4 blocks of the player and say "nope"
🧬Quality of Life - All tools, weapons, armor, etc. are enchanted
*Hold an elytra or trident in your main hand to enchant it* - Looking at a log breaks the log - Animals respawn when you kill them - Effects are infinite - Nether portal can be made out of dirt
⛏️Ores ### Stone - 30% chance of dropping coal - 20% chance of dropping raw copper - 10% chance of dropping raw iron - 10% chance of dropping raw gold - 10% chance of dropping redstone - 9% chance of dropping lapis - 7% chance of dropping an emerald - 4% chance of dropping a diamond ### Deepslate - 90% chance of no extra ore - 6% chance of raw iron - 5% chance of an emerald - 3% chance of a diamond - 3% chance of ancient debris ### Diamond - drops 1000 diamonds ### Ancient Debris - drops 1000 ancient debris
👾Entities ### Blaze - always drops 12 blaze rods ### Wither Skeleton - always drops his head ### Enderman - always drops two of his... balls ### Villagers - always minimum price for trades
💬Chat ### Blaze Rods - You can say "I'd love to have some blaze rods, please? :)" for 4 blaze rods ### Ender Pearls - You can say "I wish I had ender pearls, too" for 4 ender pearls ### Wither or Enderdragon - You can say "no u" to instantly kill them.
## 🔍Contributing Issues are welcome both in my [discord](https://discord.com/invite/23KfgguXMC/) and on [GitHub](https://github.com/chowiekomba/FabricBabyMode/tree/master#the-twenty-eighth-feature-v08) ## 📜License This mod is licensed as MIT
